title: elephantopus biflorus
intro: Elephantopus biflorus, also known as Elephantopus or two-flowered elephant's foot, is a medicinal plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Elephantopus biflorus has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, offering benefits like reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Elephantopus biflorus is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate health issues.
